Records.authors: Adams, Luise, Chaubey, Ekta, Weinzierl, Stefan
Records.description: Planar double box for NNLO ttbar production with closed top quark loop. 44 masters involving three distinct elliptic curves $E^{(a)}, E^{(b)}, E^{(c)}$ and iterated integrals of modular forms of $\Gamma_1(6)$. Variable $x$ rationalizes $\sqrt{-s(4m^2-s)}$ via $s/m^2=-(1+x^2)^2/(x(1-x^2))$. DE brought to $\varepsilon$-linear form (non-canonical but integrable).
Records.familyName: 4-mass two-loop 4-point planar double box for ttbar production with closed top loop (7 propagators)
Records.location: Section 1 (Introduction), unnumbered equation at lines 79-85; diagram in Fig. 1
